Translation file for English and Simplified Chinese notifications in Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This file is a Portable Object (PO) file header used for software localization. It specifies metadata about the translation project, including the project version (`2.0`), the language code (`en_CN`), and the name of the translation (`English + 简体通知`). The file also defines the MIME version (`1.0`), content type (`text/plain; charset=UTF-8`), and content transfer encoding (`8bit`). The `X-Generator` field indicates that POEditor.com was used to generate this file.
